channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Quebec Premier Christine Fréchette defends campaign spending promises despite budget concerns
item.description: Quebec Premier Christine Fréchette defended her recent spending commitments after concerns emerged from Finance Minister Eric Girard that her promises could exceed the province’s allocated political s...

item.title: Senate President Cayetano Leaves Leadership Fate to Divine Will Amid Political Rumors
item.description: Senate President Alan Peter Cayetano has responded calmly to ongoing rumors of another possible leadership change in the Philippine Senate. In a recent statement, he mentioned that his continued role ...

item.title: NASCAR champion Kyle Busch dies at 41 after complications from pneumonia and sepsis
item.description: Two-time NASCAR Cup Series champion Kyle Busch died at the age of 41 after suffering severe pneumonia that progressed into sepsis, according to a statement released by his family on Saturday. The fami...

item.title: Orlando Pirates crowned 2026 Betway Premiership champions after strong finish under Ouaddou
item.description: Orlando Pirates have been crowned 2026 Betway Premiership champions after a season that highlighted patience, resilience, and steady improvement under coach Abdeslam Ouaddou. The Buccaneers endured a ...

item.title: House Republicans’ committee vote on eligibility for Jan. 6 compensation fund sparks ethics concerns
item.description: A report details controversy after House Republicans on the Appropriations Committee voted on a measure related to eligibility for a $1.8 billion fund tied to claims of government “weaponization” foll...

item.title: AmaZulu defeat Durban City 1-0 in final match to secure fourth place in Betway Premiership
item.description: In the final match of the Betway Premiership season, Durban City hosted coastal rivals AmaZulu at Chatsworth Stadium on Saturday. Despite dominating the early stages with strong midfield play and atta...

item.title: U.S. Layoff Rates Remain Stable as Tech Hiring Offsets Industry Job Cuts
item.description: Recent labor data suggests that layoffs in the United States have remained relatively stable despite widespread public attention on job cuts, especially in the technology sector. According to reports ...

item.title: Freedom Bengaluru Half Marathon 2026 to be held on May 24 with over 6,000 participants
item.description: The city of Bengaluru is all set to host the Freedom Bengaluru Half Marathon (FBHM) 2026 on May 24, bringing together more than 6,000 runners from different age groups and fitness backgrounds. The eve...

item.title: Review of Two Weeks in August: Jessica Raine leads compelling BBC drama about a disastrous Greek holiday
item.description: The review covers the BBC drama Two Weeks in August, a darkly comic series set during a summer holiday in a Greek island villa that rapidly descends into chaos. At the centre is Zoe, played by Jessica...

item.title: Maureen Wroblewitz Opens Up About Her ‘Off Campus’ Audition Journey
item.description: Model and television personality Maureen Wroblewitz recently shared an audition video related to the project ‘Off Campus,’ giving fans a glimpse into a more personal and vulnerable side of her career ...

item.title: Labour Party Sets Deadline for Appeals by Disqualified and Dissatisfied Aspirants Ahead of 2027 Elections
item.description: The Labour Party don officially open an appeal process for presidential, governorship and National Assembly aspirants wey no happy with the outcome of the party’s screening exercise ahead of the 2027 ...

item.title: Abdeslam Ouaddou reflects on future after leading Orlando Pirates to historic domestic treble
item.description: Orlando Pirates head coach Abdeslam Ouaddou has expressed deep emotional exhaustion following his side’s remarkable 2025/26 Betway Premiership triumph, which sealed an historic domestic treble. The Bu...

item.title: Starmer urges free-to-air broadcast of Champions League final in UK
item.description: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer has publicly urged broadcaster TNT Sports to make the upcoming UEFA Champions League final available for free to viewers across the United Kingdom. The final, set to fea...

item.title: Vintage Portraits of Romanian Women Showcasing Traditional 'Ia' Blouses in the Interwar Period
item.description: The article presents a collection of captivating photographic portraits featuring Romanian girls and young women from the 1920s and 1930s. These images beautifully capture the essence of the interwar ...

item.title: Mark Kenny argues populist politics and One Nation’s rise are reshaping Australia’s political landscape
item.description: Political analyst Mark Kenny examines the growing instability in Australian politics following Labor’s latest federal budget and the increasing appeal of populist movements such as One Nation. The art...

item.title: ICPC clarifies court order behind denial of ADC delegation access to El-Rufai
item.description: The Independent Corrupt Practices and Other Related Offences Commission (ICPC) has explained why leaders of the African Democratic Congress (ADC) were denied access to former Kaduna State Governor, Na...

item.title: Concerns raised after claims of possible electoral malpractice ahead of 2027 Kenya elections
item.description: A section of political leaders allied to President William Ruto from Western Kenya have sparked controversy after allegedly hinting at the possibility of using undemocratic means to secure victory for...

item.title: Iran football team relocates World Cup base camp from Arizona to Mexico amid security concerns
item.description: Iran’s national football team has announced that its World Cup base camp has been moved from the United States to Mexico, following approval reportedly granted by FIFA. According to a statement attrib...

item.title: Bruno Mars Toronto concert postponed to May 31 after severe weather forecast
item.description: The first of Bruno Mars’ five scheduled concerts at Rogers Stadium in Toronto was cancelled on Saturday because of severe weather conditions expected across the Greater Toronto Area. Venue officials a...

item.title: PM Modi conveys condolences after deadly coal mine explosion in China’s Shanxi province
item.description: A tragic coal mine accident in China’s Shanxi Province has resulted in significant loss of life after a gas explosion occurred late Friday in the city of Changzhi. According to official Chinese media ...
